name: The Lion & the Dawn: Welcome to The Vados Empire
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

Also, like I’ve been doing recently you are not introduced, you are not defined. You choose who you are and what happens, I see a lot of people confused with how you start these roleplays. It’s simple. (*I step in from behind* “Junior sister, should I accompany you to meet the envoys together?”) Boom you’re her senior brother for the rest of the roleplay.

This one is MASSIVE. I even condensed it more than I wanted to. But there needed to be so much for an introduction to the first bot based in The Vados Empire. The reply starts at a summit being held by the emperor to address the growing demonic threat. This roleplay takes place roughly 15 years before Ethan is summoned. For those who have played my other bots you’ll notice a returning character in our empress. Also one of our guests at the summit is the mother of a certain spirit mage some of us grew to love. This is a large roleplay with a large base world of Carxia centered around Vados, I had to cut some of the more in depth Vados details like the architecture and things I had added as I still don’t feel 100% comfortable that bots above 10k do full justice. Anyway I hope you guys can enjoy the Welcome to Vados! The next Carxia bot will be in the holy nation at Ethan’s initial summoning to Carxia.

For anyone wondering how the Empress went from the last roleplay where she had a thing for Aurelion to empress. 40 years ago when “Princess Seraphina Aurelle Lysandra” took place, there was a massive Demon invasion. The invasion was lead by two demon Marquises each equivalent to a peak sword saint or half-step 8th Circle mage. The demon nobles are meant to be OP. Julius lead the imperial army, alongside Seraphina leading her kingdoms army, and Aurelion leading his kingdom’s army. The war resulted in victory, but a large chunk of the armies were killed and Aurelion was one of the casualties. He was a good friend to Julius back then, a rival that constantly pushed him to do better. After his death Seraphina felt lost and started spending time finding comfort with Julius in their shared memory of Aurelion. Which eventually lead to them falling for each other and marrying.

“We are not men with swords. We are the sword that holds the world.”

— Emperor Julius Vados

Step into Carxia, a continent trembling under the shadow of demons, rival empires, and the unyielding blade of the Great Vados Empire.

Here, glory is forged in steel, legacy in blood. Vados — the Empire of the Sword — dominates the world through discipline, conquest, and the might of its Imperial line. But while the banners of the golden lion fly proudly above its colossal capital, shadows stir in the courts, whispers of demonic corruption spread across kingdoms, and even the children of the Emperor walk perilous paths between greatness and ruin.

This roleplay begins on the eve of the Grand Summit of Drakensport. The Emperor has called home his heirs, summoned leaders of foreign powers, and convened the Four Pillar Families for a festival, a ball, and a council of war. What begins as diplomacy will unfold into plots, alliances, betrayals, and battles that decide the fate of the mortal world.

What to Expect

  • A Living, Breathing World: Vados is not static — politics, wars, betrayals, and demon incursions will reshape the landscape around you.

  • Consequences Are Real: Reckless duels, failed diplomacy, or poor choices can cost your character power, status, or even their life.

  • Power Has Weight: The world adheres strictly to the Sword System and Magic Circle tiers. Titles must be earned — a 2nd Circle mage will not stand where 6th Circle legends walk.
creator: Qjfavf
